calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Linda Forster, CSR #13286.

Joseph Bravo, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Hong Yang Ai, who was placed under oath and examined.
Amanda Chen, a Court Certified Interpreter, served as Mandarin speaking interpreter for plaintiff.
Jim Johannson, a Business Evaluator for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Rebeca Mei Lin Kwan, Chris Tak Wing Wai or Ken Kwan.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 28, 2007.
Default entered as to defendant Ken Kwan on August 14, 2007.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Commercial Lesea & Deposit Receipt dated 5/04/05-------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---SFFD Fire Investigation Report dated July 22, 2005-----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Corporation Grant Deed---------------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4---One Page Business Valuation - Undated------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Hong Yang Ai, and against defendants Rebecca Mei Lin Kwan, Chris Tak Wing Wai and Ken Kwan:

Damages/Principal - $203,000.00.
Costs - To Be Determined pursuant to a Memorandum of Costs, for a total judgment in the amount of $203,000.00.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than August 28, 2008.
